news.bodyKey:
Sinner, we've been refining every aspect of the game to deliver a smoother and more consistent experience.

Here's what's new:

VISUAL IMPROVEMENTS: Cleaner menus, upgraded maps, and a new death dissolve animation.

AUDIO UPDATES: New tracks for levels and menus, along with enhanced sound effects.

GAMEPLAY BALANCING: Strength has been rebalanced to better match its cost, alongside general gameplay adjustments.

DIFFICULTY SYSTEM UPDATE: Difficulty now directly affects lives and cash rewards.

QUALITY OF LIFE: Interface improvements, refined menus, notification system, and overall usability enhancements.

PERFORMANCE: Significant optimizations to improve stability and responsiveness.

DIALOGUES: New dialogue content has been added to enrich the game world.

Over 30 improvements and fixes to make the experience more polished and solid.

Thank you for your support!

news.titleKey: Final Level of World 1 Coming Soon
news.bodyKey:
The journey through the first world is about to reach its climax.

We're working on the final level, featuring a royal boss designed to challenge your strategy and timing.

Prepare yourself, Sinner. The end of World 1 is near.
